Package calendar.event

Class Event.EventBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.event.Event.EventBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    Event
    public static class Event.EventBuilder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder class for constructing an Event object.

    • Field Summary

      Modifier and Type Field Description
      boolean isAllDayEvent  

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructor Description
      EventBuilder​(java.lang.String subject, java.time.LocalDateTime start)
      Constructs a new EventBuilder with given information.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      Event build()
      Creates and returns the final event object.

      Sets the description of the event.
      Event.EventBuilder end​(java.time.LocalDateTime end)
      Sets the optional end date & time of the event.
      Event.EventBuilder location​(java.lang.String location)
      Sets the location of the event.
      Event.EventBuilder seriesId​(java.lang.String seriesId)
      Sets the series ID for recurring events.
      Event.EventBuilder setAllDayEvent()
      Marks the event as an all-day event.
      Event.EventBuilder status​(java.lang.String status)
      Sets the status (public or private) of the event.

      • EventBuilder

        public EventBuilder​(java.lang.String subject,
                    java.time.LocalDateTime start)
        Constructs a new EventBuilder with given information.
        Parameters:
        subject - the subject of the event
        start - the start date & time of the event

    • Method Detail

      • end

        public Event.EventBuilder end​(java.time.LocalDateTime end)
        Sets the optional end date & time of the event.
        Parameters:
        end - the end date & time
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • description

        public Event.EventBuilder description​(java.lang.String description)
        Sets the description of the event.
        Parameters:
        description - the event description
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • location

        public Event.EventBuilder location​(java.lang.String location)
        Sets the location of the event.
        Parameters:
        location - the event location
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • status

        public Event.EventBuilder status​(java.lang.String status)
        Sets the status (public or private) of the event.
        Parameters:
        status - a string representing the status
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • setAllDayEvent

        public Event.EventBuilder setAllDayEvent()
        Marks the event as an all-day event. If an end date/time is not explicitly set, the event will span from 8:00 to 17:00.
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • seriesId

        public Event.EventBuilder seriesId​(java.lang.String seriesId)
        Sets the series ID for recurring events.
        Parameters:
        seriesId - the ID of the event series
        Returns:
        the builder instance

      • build

        public Event build()
        Creates and returns the final event object.
        Returns:
        the constructed event
